description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a playful and decorative design, featuring a predominantly pink and white color scheme. The upper section of the bottle is pink with a round, flip-top cap and a side handle, while the lower section is white and adorned with a Hello Kitty face and floral motifs. The bottle has transparent windows revealing the contents inside, which appear to be a liquid or gel with a light orange tint. Gold-colored accent buttons are visible at the seams between the sections, adding a touch of detail. The bottle is personalized with handwritten text, including a name and a heart, giving it a custom, youthful appearance. The overall design is whimsical and clearly aimed at a younger audience or fans of Hello Kitty.
description: A tall, cylindrical shampoo bottle with a pink flip-top cap, Hello Kitty graphics, and transparent windows showing the contents inside. The bottle features playful decorations and gold accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pink cap, a round flip-top lid with text, and the Hello Kitty face with floral motifs on the lower section.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pink handle, transparent windows with visible contents, and the Hello Kitty face partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the handle, a vertical label with text, and the transparent section showing the shampoo inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing handwritten text 'ALLISON' with a heart, gold accents, and the transparent window.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and cylindrical with a rounded cap and integrated handle
attribute_packaging_graphics: Hello Kitty face, floral motifs, and heart illustration
